name: poly
description: Poly workflows for searching, reading, creating, and updating files in your Poly cloud file system.

interface.shortDescription: Search and manage your Poly file system from your agent
interface.longDescription: Poly is a cloud file system with intelligent, embedding-powered search. This plugin connects your agent to Poly so it can search, read, create, update, and organize files across your personal drive and shared drives — via the Poly desktop CLI when available, or the remote Poly MCP server otherwise.
defaultPrompt: Search my Poly files for images of my trip to Italy
Create a folder in my Poly drive and move these files into it
Summarize the contents of a folder in one of my shared drives
